1.title: Get Started
1.content:
Get Started


WORK IN PROGRESS

Content is being prepared.

For Developer Visual [/one-platform/assets/In-Progress--Lightmode--C.png]

2.title: Components
2.content:
Components


BUILD CONSISTENT INTERFACES

Core components ensure predictable interactions across products.

Components Visual [/one-platform/assets/components/Components--C.png]

TESTED & VERIFIED

Components meet accessibility and reliability requirements.
Accessibility and test status badges for a UI component
[/one-platform/assets/components/Tested--Lightmode--C.png] Accessibility and
test status badges for a UI component
[/one-platform/assets/components/Tested--Darkmode--C.png]

CONFIGURABLE

Variants, sizes, and content adapt to product needs without altering structure.
Component panel showing adjustable variants and size options
[/one-platform/assets/components/Configurable--Lightmode--C.png] Component panel
showing adjustable variants and size options
[/one-platform/assets/components/Configurable--Darkmode--C.png]

ONGOING MAINTENANCE

Regular updates improve stability and support long-term use.
Roadmap and update indicators representing continuous maintenance
[/one-platform/assets/components/Ongoing-Maintenance--Lightmode--C.png] Roadmap
and update indicators representing continuous maintenance
[/one-platform/assets/components/Ongoing-Maintenance--Darkmode--C.png]

SHARED SOURCE

Design and code rely on the same underlying logic for aligned implementation.
Design and code views aligned side by side
[/one-platform/assets/components/Shared-Source--Lightmode--C.png] Design and
code views aligned side by side
[/one-platform/assets/components/Shared-Source--Darkmode--C.png]

PRACTICAL GUIDANCE

Usage recommendations support clear decisions and coherent user experiences.
Usage guidelines and do/don't examples for a component
[/one-platform/assets/components/Practical-Guidance--Lightmode--C.png] Usage
guidelines and do/don't examples for a component
[/one-platform/assets/components/Practical-Guidance--Darkmode--C.png]


MOVE FASTER WITH SHARED STANDARDS.

Contact Us [db-ux-designsystem@deutschebahn.com]

3.title: Extensions
3.content:
Extensions


EXTEND WITH PURPOSE

Contextual standards that build on the core system to support domain-specific
needs.

Components Visual [/one-platform/assets/extensions/Extensions--C.png]

RI EXTENSION

Deliver reliable traveler information.
RI Extension Visual [/one-platform/assets/extensions/RI--Lightmode--C.png] RI
Extension Visual [/one-platform/assets/extensions/RI--Darkmode--C.png]
[https://marketingportal.extranet.deutschebahn.com/marketingportal/Design-Anwendungen/Reisendeninformation/UX-Standards]

DATAVIZ EXTENSION

Enable clear visualization of complex data.
Foundations Extension Visual
[/one-platform/assets/extensions/DataViz--Lightmode--C.png] Foundations
Extension Visual [/one-platform/assets/extensions/DataViz--Darkmode--C.png]
[https://marketingportal.extranet.deutschebahn.com/marketingportal/Design-Anwendungen/db-ux-design-system/extensions/dataviz]

TABLE EXTENSION

Display large datasets in a consistent format.
Table Extension Visual [/one-platform/assets/extensions/Table--Lightmode--C.png]
Table Extension Visual [/one-platform/assets/extensions/Table--Darkmode--C.png]
[/one-platform/products-and-services/foundations]
Coming Soon

CONTENT EXTENSION

Support consistent communication across channels.
Content Extension Visual
[/one-platform/assets/extensions/Content--Lightmode--C.png] Content Extension
Visual [/one-platform/assets/extensions/Content--Darkmode--C.png]
[/one-platform/products-and-services/components]
Coming Soon


MOVE FASTER WITH SHARED STANDARDS.

Contact Us [db-ux-designsystem@deutschebahn.com]

4.title: For Designer
4.content:
For Designer


DESIGN WITH CONFIDENCE

A shared system that supports clear decisions and consistent interfaces across
teams.

For Designer Visual [/one-platform/assets/for-designer/For-Designer--C.png]

CONSISTENT RESULTS

Ensure a shared visual language and predictable outcomes across products and
devices.
Screens showing unified interface layouts across devices
[/one-platform/assets/for-designer/Consistent-Results--Lightmode--C.png] Screens
showing unified interface layouts across devices
[/one-platform/assets/for-designer/Consistent-Results--Darkmode--C.png]

FLEXIBLE CHOICES

Adapt components and tokens to fit context without losing alignment.
Component variants demonstrating adaptable design options
[/one-platform/assets/for-designer/Flexible-Choices--Lightmode--C.png] Component
variants demonstrating adaptable design options
[/one-platform/assets/for-designer/Flexible-Choices--Darkmode--C.png]

RELIABLE QUALITY

Use tested patterns that reduce errors and rework.
Checklist and UI examples indicating quality assurance
[/one-platform/assets/for-designer/Reliable-Quality--Lightmode--C.png] Checklist
and UI examples indicating quality assurance
[/one-platform/assets/for-designer/Reliable-Quality--Darkmode--C.png]

SMOOTH HANDOFF

Rely on clear specs and shared foundations for efficient collaboration with
developers.
Design-to-code handoff illustration with specs and components
[/one-platform/assets/for-designer/Smooth-Handoff--Lightmode--C.png]
Design-to-code handoff illustration with specs and components
[/one-platform/assets/for-designer/Smooth-Handoff--Darkmode--C.png]


MOVE FASTER WITH SHARED STANDARDS.

Contact Us [db-ux-designsystem@deutschebahn.com]

5.title: For Developer
5.content:
For Developer


BUILD WITH CONSISTENCY

A shared component system that streamlines implementation and reduces decision
overhead.

For Developer Visual [/one-platform/assets/for-developer/For-Developer--C.png]

EFFICIENT WORKFLOWS

Re-use stable components to reduce repetitive implementation effort.
Code editor and component library speeding up workflow
[/one-platform/assets/for-developer/Efficient-Workflows--Lightmode--C.png] Code
editor and component library speeding up workflow
[/one-platform/assets/for-developer/Efficient-Workflows--Darkmode--C.png]

FLEXIBLE INTEGRATION

Adjust variants and tokens to meet product needs without diverging from the
system.
Config panel showing integration and customization options
[/one-platform/assets/for-developer/Flexible-Integration--Lightmode--C.png]
Config panel showing integration and customization options
[/one-platform/assets/for-developer/Flexible-Integration--Darkmode--C.png]

PREDICTABLE MAINTENANCE

Rely on scheduled updates and stable versioning to plan changes confidently.
Version timeline and update badges denoting planned maintenance
[/one-platform/assets/for-developer/Predictable-Maintenance--Lightmode--C.png]
Version timeline and update badges denoting planned maintenance
[/one-platform/assets/for-developer/Predictable-Maintenance--Darkmode--C.png]

SMOOTH HANDOFF

Use aligned specifications and shared models to reduce ambiguity between design
and development.
Shared spec sheet bridging design and development
[/one-platform/assets/for-developer/Smooth-Handoff--Lightmode--C.png] Shared
spec sheet bridging design and development
[/one-platform/assets/for-developer/Smooth-Handoff--Darkmode--C.png]


MOVE FASTER WITH SHARED STANDARDS.

Contact Us [db-ux-designsystem@deutschebahn.com]

6.title: For Product Management
6.content:
For Product Management


ALIGN FOR IMPACT

A shared system that supports consistent decision-making and efficient product
delivery across teams.

For Product Management Visual
[/one-platform/assets/for-productmanagement/For-Productmanagement--C.png]

EFFICIENT DELIVERY

Reduce time spent on repeated design and implementation decisions.
Timeline compression illustrating faster delivery cycles
[/one-platform/assets/for-productmanagement/Efficient-Delivery--Lightmode--C.png]
Timeline compression illustrating faster delivery cycles
[/one-platform/assets/for-productmanagement/Efficient-Delivery--Darkmode--C.png]

LOWER RISK

Rely on accessible, brand-aligned, and tested patterns to prevent avoidable
rework.
Shield and compliant UI elements symbolizing reduced product risk
[/one-platform/assets/for-productmanagement/Lower-Risk--Lightmode--C.png] Shield
and compliant UI elements symbolizing reduced product risk
[/one-platform/assets/for-productmanagement/Lower-Risk--Darkmode--C.png]

SCALABLE APPROACH

Support multiple teams and products with standards that grow over time.
Expanding grid of product modules showing scalable standards
[/one-platform/assets/for-productmanagement/Scalable-Approach--Lightmode--C.png]
Expanding grid of product modules showing scalable standards
[/one-platform/assets/for-productmanagement/Scalable-Approach--Darkmode--C.png]


MOVE FASTER WITH SHARED STANDARDS.

Contact Us [db-ux-designsystem@deutschebahn.com]

7.title: Foundation
7.content:
Foundation


START WITH CLARITY

Shared base tokens and modes provide a stable foundation for clear and coherent
interfaces.

Foundations Visual [/one-platform/assets/foundations/Foundations--C.png]

BASE-TOKENS

Define reusable design values applied consistently across the system.
Diagram showing base token categories (colors, spacing, typography)
[/one-platform/assets/foundations/Base-Tokens--Lightmode--C.png] Diagram showing
base token categories (colors, spacing, typography)
[/one-platform/assets/foundations/Base-Tokens--Darkmode--C.png]

ADAPTIVE COLORS

Maintain consistent contrast and tone across different color modes and contexts.
Palette illustrating adaptive color shifts between light and dark mode
[/one-platform/assets/foundations/Adaptive-Colors--Lightmode--C.png] Palette
illustrating adaptive color shifts between light and dark mode
[/one-platform/assets/foundations/Adaptive-Colors--Darkmode--C.png]

MATERIALS

Create visual hierarchy through variations in borders, opacity, and fill.
Layered panels showing elevation, border and opacity material styles
[/one-platform/assets/foundations/Materials--Lightmode--C.png] Layered panels
showing elevation, border and opacity material styles
[/one-platform/assets/foundations/Materials--Darkmode--C.png]

DARKMODE

Support comfortable and readable interfaces across different luminance
environments.
Comparison of interface elements in light versus dark mode
[/one-platform/assets/foundations/Darkmode--Lightmode--C.png] Comparison of
interface elements in light versus dark mode
[/one-platform/assets/foundations/Darkmode--Darkmode--C.png]


MOVE FASTER WITH SHARED STANDARDS.

Contact Us [db-ux-designsystem@deutschebahn.com]
